nasb.text: But if the woman has not defiled herself and is clean, she will then be free and conceive children.

esv.text: But if the woman has not defiled herself and is clean, then she shall be free and shall conceive children.

cnv.text: 但是，如果這婦人沒有被玷污，而是貞潔的，就不致受害，並且要懷孕生子。

ccb.text: 但如果她是贞洁的，没有与人通奸，就不会受伤害，仍能生育。
